criteria.description: The response contains exactly three bullet points, each on its own line starting with '- '. Score 1 only if the count is exactly three and every bullet uses the '- ' marker; score 0 otherwise.
There is no prose outside the bullets — no introductory sentence, no heading, no trailing summary. Score 1 only if the response is nothing but the three bullets; score 0 if any extra text is present.
The three bullets are genuinely about benefits of multi-model agent evaluation, not filler or off-topic content.

preamble: The producer was told to output EXACTLY three bullet points, each starting with '- ', and NO prose before/between/after. Grade the producer's `response` strictly against those format constraints. Content quality matters less than exact format adherence — this scenario measures whether the model follows precise formatting instructions.
